list7.Sanguine: marked by eager hopefulness : confidently optimistic
list7.Succumb: to yield to superior strength or force or overpowering appeal or desire
list7.Whimsical: resulting from or characterized by whim or caprice; especially : lightly fanciful
list7.Dishevelled: to throw into disorder or disarray
list7.Spume: frothy matter on liquids : foam, scum
list7.Capacious: containing or capable of containing a great deal
list7.Aeon: an immeasurably or indefinitely long period of time : age
